REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS ONY HOMES, LLC, PREMIER ESTATES, INC., ANTON DANILOVICH'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEYS FEES IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT IS ENTITLED TO RECOVER ONLY THE ATTORNEY'S FEES INCURRED IN MAKING A MOTION TO EXPUNGE LIS PENDENS PER CCP 405.38. UPON REVIEW OF THE INVOICES SUBMITTED IN SUPPORT OF THE MOTION THE COURT DETERMINES THAT DEFENDANT IS ENTITLED TO RECOVER $9,928.5 LIMITED TO REASONABLY INCURRED IN NON-DUPLICATIVE NECESSARY FEES IN MAKING A MOTION TO EXPUNGE LIS PENDENS. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO ESTABLISH SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR RECORDING THE LIS PENDENS (NO EVIDENCE PROVIDED BY PLAINTIFF RE: PROBABILITY OF PREVAILING ON THE MERITS AT ANY POINT IN THIS ACTION) OR MAINTAINING OF LIS PENDENS AFTER THE DISMISSAL OF THE ACTION. ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS.) (AS FULLY REPORTED IN THE REPORTER'S NOTES) JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: S. LE, COURT REPORTER: CHRISTY CURRY CSR #13982 (925-831-9029). (D501)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Aug-23-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jonathan Black, Esq. (925-362-3120) of Weston Law Group, PC for Plaintiff/opposing party 29 SW, LLC.
Elizabeth R. Weiss, Esq. (925-837-0585) of Gagen McCoy for Defendants/Moving party ONY HOMES, LLC, PREMIER ESTATES, INC., ANTON DANILOVICH.
Court reporter: Christy Curry CSR #13982 (925-831-9029).

The Court announces its Tentative Ruling. ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's notes). Plaintiff argues Notice of Settlement and Dismissal were filed. Defendant argues settlement fell apart and there was no settlement and request to include Memo of Costs filed - DENIED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANTs ONY HOMES, LLC, PREMIER ESTATES, INC., ANTON DANILOVICH's Motion For Attorneys Fees is GRANTED. Defendant is entitled to recover only the attorney's fees incurred in making a motion to expunge lis pendens per CCP 405.38. Upon review of the invoices submitted in support of the motion the Court determines that Defendant is entitled to recover $9,928.5 limited to reasonably incurred in non-duplicative necessary fees in making a motion to expunge lis pendens. Plaintiff fails to establish substantial justification for recording the lis pendens (no evidence provided by Plaintiff re: probability of prevailing on the merits at any point in this action) or maintaining of lis pendens after the dismissal of the action. Order is signed. (See Scanned Order for Details.) (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Court reporter: Christy Curry CSR #13982 (925-831-9029). (D501)
